sections.paragraph: m. (root אָמַר No. 1 [“and see Hithp.”]), the head, top, summit-(a) of a tree (Wipfel), Isa 17:6, בְּרֹאשׁ אָמִיד “on the highest top.”-(b) of a mountain (Gipfel), id. verse Isa 17:9on which see the remarks in the notes to my German translation, second edition. [“See under the art. עֲזוּבָה.”]
